Dear {{recipient.displayName}},

For easier and more convenient access,

you may now connect with your RM via WeChat for your banking needs.

Please note, all

transaction-related correspondence should still be conducted through email or myRM.

To
start using WeChat, please follow these simple steps below:
Open WeChat on your mobile device and tap the ""+"" icon

in the top right corner, followed by Scan.

Scan the QR code
below to follow our official WeChat account, - <span
Please note that the QR code expires in
If it has expired, please contact your Relationship Manager for assistance.
Upon following our account successfully, you will receive a One-Time Password (OTP) on
your bank registered mobile number. The OTP is valid for 180 secs. Please enter it to
Once your identity has been verified, you will receive a confirmation message and you
can begin messaging your Relationship Manager through the <span
any questions or require further assistance, please do not hesitate to contact your dedicated
Relationship Manager, via myRM available on the SC Mobile Banking App or Online Banking on Monday to
We look forward to staying connected with you through WeChat.
Standard Chartered Priority Banking and Priority Private
There have been reports of SMS and email phishing targeting bank customers in Singapore.
Please do NOT click on the links in any unusual or suspicious SMSes and/or emails, or provide
any sensitive personal details, login credentials, PINs, OTPs. We would never ask you to
reveal sensitive personal information or passwords, or validate your account over SMSes,
emails or phone calls. If you receive any suspicious SMSes, emails or phone calls, please call

尊敬的 {{recipient.displayName}}，

我们很高兴地通知您，我们已扩展沟通渠道，以提升您的银行体验并提供更大的便利。

敬请注意，所有交易相关的往来仍须通过电子邮件或 myRM 进行。

要开始使用此渠道，请按照以下简单步骤操作：

渣打银行优先理财和优先私人理财
有报告称，新加坡发生了针对银行客户的短信和电子邮件网络钓鱼诈骗。请勿点击任何异常或可疑短信和/或电子邮件中的链接，也不要提供任何敏感的个人详细信息、登录凭据、PIN、OTP。我们绝不会要求您透露敏感的个人信息或密码，也不会通过短信、电子邮件或电话验证您的账户。如果您收到任何可疑的短信、电子邮件或电话，请立即致电联系我们。
